name: Chicken Green Bean and Dill Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 pound green beans, trimmed, halved crosswise
1/2 cup snipped or chopped fresh dill
recipeInstructions:
1. Grill 4 chicken-breast halves until cooked through, about 6-8 inches.
2. Slice the grilled chicken into half-inch strips.
3. Halve the red radishes and thinly slice the red onion.
4. Gently boil the green beans in water to cover for 7 to 8 minutes until just tender. Drain and cool under cold running water.
5. In a serving bowl, mix Dill Dressing ingredients until blended. Stir in the chicken, radishes, onion, and cooled beans.
